coin_profile.name: NEAR Protocol
coin_profile.description: NEAR Protocol is a developer-friendly Layer 1 blockchain with a focus on usability and scalability. It uses a sharding technique called Nightshade to achieve high throughput. NEAR is notable for its human-readable account names and low transaction costs.

NEAR.name: NEAR Protocol

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Margin of safety present — price near or below speculative fair value during accumulation (deep bear) phase.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 7.2/10 and survivability 86.7%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. M1 DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. M2 P/S compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. M3 P/E uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. M+ NVT treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. M+ Dilution-adj penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

NEAR.iv_method: M2 P/S analog, M+ NVT, M+ Peer value

bull_points: Multi-year on-chain data available — protocol has an established track record of fee generation across market cycles
Strong quality score of 7.2/10 (Safe) across all key metrics
NEAR Protocol maintains a top-50 market cap position with established liquidity
bear_points: DCF model suggests NEAR Protocol is trading at a 7765.9% premium to fair value (est. $0.02)
High MC/Fees ratio of 455.97x means investors are paying a large premium relative to actual protocol fee generation
Up 31% over 30 days — strong momentum but increases the risk of a short-term correction
